name: Red Beans & Rice (Usa Rice)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Canned red kidney beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
A lightening-quick version of the classic, this cooks in the time it takes to boil the rice. Hot sauce, please?
1. Heat oil over medium heat in a medium nonstick skillet.
2. Add ham (if using) and cook until just starting to brown, about 1 minute.
3. Add onion, bell pepper, celery, garlic, and jalapeno pepper. Cook, stirring constantly, until vegetables are soft, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in beans, tomato juice, oregano, and 1/4 cup water. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
6. Spoon bean mixture over hot cooked rice and sprinkle with scallions and parsley to garnish.
Each serving (generous 1/2 cup bean mixture with ham and 1/2 cup rice) provides:
1/2 Fat, 1-1/4 Vegetables, 2 Protein, 1 Breads
Per serving (with ham):  281 calories, 14 grams protein, 47 grams carbohydrates
4 grams fat: 2 grams polyunsaturated, 1 gram monounsaturated, 1 gram saturated
480 milligrams sodium, 14 milligrams cholesterol
Each serving (1/2 cup) without ham provides:
1/2 Fat, 1-1/4 Vegetables, 1 Protein, 1 Breads
Per serving (without ham):  250 calories, 9 grams protein, 46 grams carbohydrates
3 grams fat: 2 grams polyunsaturated, 1 gram monounsaturated, 0 grams saturated
247 milligrams sodium, 0 milligrams cholesterol
